'''Bargu''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Clawdite/Legends|Clawdite]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Commander]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Clawdite/Legends|Clawdite]], Bargu received her early [[Jedi training/Legends|education]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple's]] [[Jedi academy|academy]]. Selected as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] after the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a conflict between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Bargu was made a [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Commander]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]].<ref name="YDR" />

Stationed at the Temple in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Bargu participated in the [[Jedi Temple Apprentice Tournament|Apprentice Tournament]] overseen by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ilena Xan]]. Making it through to the Round of Eight, which was held in one of the Temple [[Jedi Temple refectory/Legends|refectories]], Bargu was defeated in [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|combat]] by a [[Chagrian/Legends|Chagrian]] Padawan, [[Lena Missa]], by a blow to the arm with a [[Training lightsaber/Legends|training lightsaber]].<ref name="YDR" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' {{Ab|Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
